title: euphoria longan
intro: Euphoria longan, also known as Euphorbia longan, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia longan include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Euphoria longan can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile plant for various health remedies.
